ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "num_zones" INTEGER /* Number of zones within the building */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the building */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the building is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the zone is located */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where energy was consumed */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of energy consumption */,
  "electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption in Joules */,
  "gas" REAL /* Gas consumption in Joules */,
  "water" REAL /* Water consumption in liters */,
  "renewable_energy" REAL /* Renewable energy consumption in Joules */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy_data" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where occupancy was recorded */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone within the building */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of occupancy */,
  "occupant_count" INTEGER /* Number of occupants in the zone */,
  "occupancy_percentage" REAL /* Occupancy percentage of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_data_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, energy_manager, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_building_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building with access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_building_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_building_access_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (occupancy, electricity, gas, water) */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_benchmark" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building with the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (electricity, gas, water) */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_benchmark_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
